'''folajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:pubocervical|pubocervical]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-l-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pubocervical|pubocervical]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| folajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:folajithi|folajithi]] || [[word:folajiji|folajiji]] || [[word:folajishi|folajishi]] || [[word:folajiki|folajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:folajuthuthu|folajuthuthu]] || [[word:folajujuju|folajujuju]] || [[word:folajushushu|folajushushu]] || [[word:folajukuku|folajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:folajuthu|folajuthu]] || [[word:folajuju|folajuju]] || [[word:folajushu|folajushu]] || [[word:folajuku|folajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:folajufthuf|folajufthuf]] || [[word:folajufjuf|folajufjuf]] || [[word:folajufshuf|folajufshuf]] || [[word:folajufkuf|folajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:folajethe|folajethe]] || [[word:folajeje|folajeje]] || [[word:folajeshe|folajeshe]] || [[word:folajeke|folajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:folajothotho|folajothotho]] || [[word:folajojojo|folajojojo]] || [[word:folajoshosho|folajoshosho]] || [[word:folajokoko|folajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:folajotho|folajotho]] || [[word:folajojo|folajojo]] || [[word:folajosho|folajosho]] || [[word:folajoko|folajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:folajofthof|folajofthof]] || [[word:folajofjof|folajofjof]] || [[word:folajofshof|folajofshof]] || [[word:folajofkof|folajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:folajÃŸfthÃŸf|folajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:folajÃŸfjÃŸf|folajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:folajÃŸfshÃŸf|folajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:folajÃŸfkÃŸf|folajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:folajÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|folajÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:folajÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|folajÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:folajÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|folajÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:folajÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|folajÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:folajÃŸfthÃŸf|folajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:folajÃŸfjÃŸf|folajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:folajÃŸfshÃŸf|folajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:folajÃŸfkÃŸf|folajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:folajÃŸfthÃŸf|folajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:folajÃŸfjÃŸf|folajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:folajÃŸfshÃŸf|folajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:folajÃŸfkÃŸf|folajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:folajÃḊthÃḊ|folajÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:folajÃḊjÃḊ|folajÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:folajÃḊshÃḊ|folajÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:folajÃḊkÃḊ|folajÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:folajathatha|folajathatha]] || [[word:folajajaja|folajajaja]] || [[word:folajashasha|folajashasha]] || [[word:folajakaka|folajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:folajatha|folajatha]] || [[word:folajaja|folajaja]] || [[word:folajasha|folajasha]] || [[word:folajaka|folajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:folajafthaf|folajafthaf]] || [[word:folajafjaf|folajafjaf]] || [[word:folajafshaf|folajafshaf]] || [[word:folajafkaf|folajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:folajasha|folajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:folajshÃḋsha|folajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:folajrosha|folajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:folajmusha|folajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:folajyasha|folajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofolajnkshÃḋsha|gofolajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofolajnkrosha|gofolajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofolajnkmusha|gofolajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofolajnkyasha|gofolajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:folalajasha|folalajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:folalajshÃḋsha|folalajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:folalajrosha|folalajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:folalajmusha|folalajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:folalajyasha|folalajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofolalajnkshÃḋsha|gofolalajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofolalajnkrosha|gofolalajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofolalajnkmusha|gofolalajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofolalajnkyasha|gofolalajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:felÃḊjasha|felÃḊjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:felÃḊjshÃḋsha|felÃḊjshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:felÃḊjrosha|felÃḊjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:felÃḊjmusha|felÃḊjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:felÃḊjyasha|felÃḊjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofelÃḊjnkshÃḋsha|gofelÃḊjnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofelÃḊjnkrosha|gofelÃḊjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofelÃḊjnkmusha|gofelÃḊjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofelÃḊjnkyasha|gofelÃḊjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:folfajasha|folfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:folfajshÃḋsha|folfajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:folfajrosha|folfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:folfajmusha|folfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:folfajyasha|folfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofolfajnkshÃḋsha|gofolfajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofolfajnkrosha|gofolfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofolfajnkmusha|gofolfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofolfajnkyasha|gofolfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
